title: Office Compact
definition: This is a packaged policy suitable for small and medium business enterprises. It offers various classes of insurance under one policy without subjecting each class to a minimum premium. The classes are Fire, Burglary, All Risks, WIBA, Public Liability, Money and more. Who is the product for? It's suitable for businesses with fixed and movable work property.
benefits: Fire Burglary All Risks WIBA Public Liability Money
eligibility: Please contact Old Mutual Uganda for detailed eligibility and application requirements.
